frontmatter_overrides.description: Browser automation with the playwright-cli CLI tool. Use when the user needs to automate browser interactions, navigate websites, test web applications, take screenshots, fill forms, extract data from web pages, or interact with headless browsers. Also use when the user mentions "playwright-cli", "playwright", "browser automation", "headless browser", "web scraping", "screenshot", "snapshot", "browser testing", or wants to open, click, fill, or type in a web page.
